name: nexacro-webflux-port
description: Spring Boot / Spring MVC 기반 Nexacro 모듈(xapi / xeni / uiadapter)을 Spring WebFlux 로 포팅하는 전체 플레이북. Covers classpath shim, ServletProvider, multipart dispatch, paramOf equivalence, WebFilter bypass, ResultHandler ordering, stub shim limitations, base-path and static resource mapping.
